name: rf-los-planner
description: Dev/CI tooling for the RF Line of Sight Planner. The app itself is static (index.html + js/app.js, no build step); these scripts only run in CI.

scripts.check:js: node --check js/app.js && node --check js/share-codec.js && node --check js/repeaters.js && node --check scripts/build-repeaters.mjs
scripts.test: npm run check:js && npm run test:smoke
